file_type.title: File type
file_type.description: Types of data files include raw data (ASCII, EBCDIC, etc.) and software-dependent files such as SAS datasets, SPSS export files, etc.

source_format.title: Source file format
source_format.description: Uploaded source format: csv, dta, or sav. Distinct from documentation version.

source_format_version.title: Source format version
source_format_version.description: Software format version of the source file (e.g. Stata 14, SPSS file version).

source_status.title: Source file status
source_status.description: Lifecycle of the uploaded source file relative to the working CSV.
